headline: Connect (X) 2026 to Feature AI Network and Edge Leaders from NVIDIA, Nokia, T-Mobile, American Tower, Intel, JLL, Qualcomm
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 19, 2026--AI and digital infrastructure leaders from NVIDIA, Nokia, T‑Mobile, American Tower, Intel, JLL, and Qualcomm to keynote at Connect (X) May 4-6, 2026.
